result_summary.description: Highly noisy, grainy black-and-white texture with no discernible glyph, character, or geometric shape; appears to be a degraded scan artifact or piece of rough textured surface.

Highly noisy, degraded black-and-white texture with irregular blotchy patterns that may represent characters of ancient Chinese seal or oracle script, but the image is too grainy and distorted to read any specific glyph.
Dense cluster of black ink-like marks with no clearly distinguishable single glyph; appears to be a heavily crowded or smudged section of script.

Irregular high-contrast black and white pattern with scattered dots and fragmented shapes, resembling printed texture, noise, or a deteriorated ink mark. No recognizable character, geometric figure, or script is discernible.

A character in Chinese seal script style with a square outer enclosure (囗 radical) and internal strokes, possibly 回 or a similar enclosed character. The glyph has a rough, carved/stamped appearance with thick black strokes against a light background.
Highly fragmented, noisy black-and-white speckled pattern with no discernible glyph, character, or geometric form. Appears to be a damaged or artifact-laden image rather than a recognizable symbol.
A rough, hand-drawn stick figure or sketch of a person in a crouched or sitting position, with angular lines forming what appears to be a body, head, and limbs.
Highly pixelated, noisy black-and-white pattern with scattered white blobs and irregular shapes on a black background; no recognizable glyph, character, or geometric form is discernible.
Heavily pixelated, noisy black and white image with no discernible glyph, character, or geometric figure. The pattern appears to be random noise without any identifiable features.

A highly blurred and pixelated glyph with intricate curved and angular strokes characteristic of ancient Chinese seal or oracle script; individual components are difficult to resolve due to low resolution.

Highly pixelated, noisy black-and-white texture with no discernible character, symbol, or geometric figure. The image appears to be a fragment of noise or a heavily compressed/blurred portion of a larger image.

Highly degraded, noisy black ink stamp impression showing what appears to be an ancient Chinese character or seal script glyph, with thick black strokes and white background patches; individual character strokes are difficult to discern due to image artifacts and low resolution.

A complex, intricate black-on-white decorative pattern with many intertwining organic shapes that resembles an ornamental design or highly stylized Chinese seal script, too elaborate to be a single identifiable glyph.
Complex Chinese seal script character with dense, intertwined curved and angular strokes typical of zhuanshu (篆書) style.
Vertical column of Chinese characters in seal/clerical script style with thick, stylized strokes arranged in a tall rectangular block.
Heavily noisy black-and-white pixelated image with scattered white specks and irregular marks on a black background; no recognizable glyph, letter, or geometric form is discernible.

Complex ancient Chinese character in oracle bone script style, with a top section showing small dot-like marks or short strokes, a central body with interwoven curves and angular strokes, and a lower portion with additional structural elements typical of Shang dynasty inscriptions.
Noisy black-and-white stippled texture resembling a halftone or dithered pattern; no recognizable glyph, letter, or geometric figure is discernible.
